title: Oru Thuli Vishamaai Lyrics Aadhi Bhagavan Songs Lyrics
stanzas:
Song: Oru Thuli Vishamaai
Singers: Sharib Sabri, Shreya Goshal
Movie: Aadhi Bhagavan
Music: Yuvan
Lyrics : Snehan


Oru Thuli Vishamaai 
kadhal uyirl kalakudhae
Arainodi pozhudhil uyirum
irandhe pirakudhe, pirakudhe , mayakkudhe

velludhey veludhey murangalai velludhey
kolludhey kolludhey thavanayil kolludhey

unnai marakka thunidhu paarthaen
ada indha nenjam vara marukkudhey
varaya varaya alithu paarthaen
adhil meendum unnai manam varayudhey

mounathaaley paasayaaley,
aasayaalaey avasthayaaley
kadhal thaedi uyir udharudhey

Oru Thuli Vishamaai
kadhal uyirl kalakudhae
Arainodi pozhudhil uyirum
irandhe pirakudhe, pirakudhe , mayakkudhe

Maranam thaedum podhum
mayakkam kondu jeevan
vazhavadhen vazhavadhen
uravukaaga yengi manusapoovum
ondru saavadhen , saavadhen

Thadividhikaadhe, manam mandiyidum podhum
uyir thunbam padupodhum
unnai marakaadhe

Marumurai ini pirapadhaa,
un arugile thanithirupadhaa
kadhale ingu maruppadhaa
illai verupadhaa
oru vidaikodu vidaikodu idhyathill
idhyathill idam kodu
thudikkiren thavikiren
thudikkiren thavikiren , thavikiren

Kadhal ennum theeyill karugakooda penmai
thundhadhey thunidhadhey
Amila nadhiyai kooda amudham endru enni
neendhudhey neendhudhey

Oli theriyaadhey, vizhi pathikira podhu
udal thithikira podhu vilai kidayaadhey

udaikiren naan udaikiren ada
unvasam saranadaikiren
karaikiren mella uraikiren
unnil medhaikiren
ini mudivedu mudivedu idhayathil
idhyathill idam kodu
thudikkiren thavikiren
thudikkiren thavikiren , thavikiren

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song
enrichedMetadata.summary: In Oru Thuli Vishamaai, the singers express a profound sense of love and yearning, making it a perfect fit for romantic occasions. The song's lyrics delve into the complexities of relationships, highlighting the emotional turmoil that comes with love. Set against the backdrop of the movie Aadhi Bhagavan, it resonates with anyone who has experienced the highs and lows of romance. The soothing melody and heartfelt delivery evoke a sense of nostalgia and longing, making it a memorable piece in Tamil cinema.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Oru Thuli Vishamaai from the movie Aadhi Bhagavan is a mesmerizing duet that beautifully captures the essence of love and longing. With the enchanting voices of Sharib Sabri and Shreya Ghoshal, paired with Yuvan's soulful composition, this song is sure to tug at your heartstrings. Experience the magic of romance as the lyrics unfold a tale of deep emotions and connection.
stanzaMeanings: As a drop of poison, love takes life away. In the moment of separation, life and death intertwine, intertwine, and confuse.
Shining brightly, shining brightly, the sounds are shining. Hold on tightly, tightly, in the embrace of the universe.
I saw you and forgot you, oh this heart is now lost. It keeps coming back, coming back, and I see you again in my thoughts.
Through silence, through love, through hope, in this state, love seeks to give life back.
As a drop of poison, love takes life away. In the moment of separation, life and death intertwine, intertwine, and confuse.
When death is sought, life is filled with confusion. To connect with relationships, let the human flower bloom, bloom.
Don't forget, even when the heart is troubled, don't forget me when life is painful.
No more rebirths, will you stay close to me? Is love here to stay or is it just a passing phase? I keep asking, asking, and I keep trying, trying, and trying.
Love is not a fire, it can be bitter. Don't let the sweetness fade away, fade away. Think of the river as nectar and keep dreaming, dreaming.
Don't let the light fade, when the eyes are closed, the body feels heavy, don't let the value diminish.
I am breaking away, I am breaking away, oh your presence is my refuge. I am slowly speaking, I am rising in you, now let it end, let it end, I keep trying, trying, and trying.
As a drop of poison, love takes life away. In the moment of separation, life and death intertwine, intertwine, and confuse.
